qrPage.title: Friends Get Friends Event
qrPage.subtitle: Scan this QR code to download DeltaHi

banner.title: Download DeltaHi App
banner.description: Join the Friends Get Friends event and continue on your mobile device.

banner.title: Continue to DeltaHi Download
banner.description: Verify your employee ID before continuing to the app download.

status.invalidReferral: Referral link is invalid or expired.

employeeLookup.notFoundContinue: Employee ID {employeeId} was not found. You can still continue to download.
employeeLookup.verifyErrorContinue: Unable to verify this employee ID right now. You can still continue to download.
employeeLookup.verifyErrorDownload: Unable to verify this employee ID right now. You can still download the app.
employeeLookup.notFoundDownload: Employee ID {employeeId} was not found. You can still download the app, but this referral will not be recorded.

dialog.title: Download the DeltaHi app
dialog.instructions: Tap Download App to save your referral and install the app.

tutorial.label: Tutorial
tutorial.iosStep1: 1. Tap Download App to open the App Store.
tutorial.iosStep2: 2. Tap Get, then confirm with Face ID, Touch ID, or passcode.
tutorial.iosStep3: 3. Open DeltaHi and complete your first login.
tutorial.androidStep1: 1. Tap Download App to open Google Play.
tutorial.androidStep2: 2. Tap Install and wait for the download to finish.
tutorial.androidStep3: 3. Open DeltaHi and complete your first login.

errors.validReferralAndEmployee: Open a valid referral link and enter your employee ID first.
errors.saveReferral: Unable to save your referral. Please try again.
errors.detectOs: Unable to detect your device. Please choose your phone.
errors.openDownload: Unable to open the download link. Please try again.
